name: Email Tool
description: Send emails via Microsoft Graph API. Requires an Entra (Azure AD) app registration with admin-consented Mail.Send application permission.

tools.name: email.send
tools.description: Send an email to one or more recipients. Requires admin-configured Microsoft 365 credentials.
tools.argumentsSchemaJson: {"type":"object","properties":{"to":{"oneOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}}],"description":"Recipient address or array of addresses"},"cc":{"oneOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}}],"description":"CC address(es)"},"subject":{"type":"string","description":"Email subject"},"body":{"type":"string","description":"Email body text"},"html":{"type":"boolean","description":"If true, body is treated as HTML (default false)"}},"required":["to","subject","body"]}
